comments: ADAReporting.com was built specifically for public sector organizations — school districts, municipalities, and government agencies — that face legal ADA compliance obligations under Title II and Section 508 but lack internal accessibility expertise. The tool crawls entire public-facing websites (up to 10,000 pages), runs axe-core-based WCAG 2.1 AA analysis, and delivers executive-ready PDF reports with plain-English fix guidance. A unique feature is the Issue Inspector: each violation links to a screenshot of the exact broken element captured at scan time, with the element highlighted, so non-technical staff can immediately understand what needs to be fixed. Reports include a manual review checklist for issues that require human judgment beyond automated detection.
features: ADAReporting.com is an automated WCAG 2.1 AA compliance scanning service for public school and government websites. title: ADAReporting.com
